title: Improve Inventory mutation score from 68% to 75%+
description:
Stryker run on 2026-06-09 scored 68.15% for the Inventory module — above the break threshold (60%) but below the low threshold (75%). Closer to target than Catalog but still needs work.

**No-coverage (untested paths):**
- ProductStockRepository.cs: 13.33% — 13 no-coverage mutants (biggest single win)
- InventoryQueries.cs: 48.48% — 11 no-coverage mutants
- StockEntry.cs: 66.67% — 4 no-coverage mutants
- StockReason.cs: 50.00% — 3 no-coverage mutants
- StockSourceType.cs: 28.57% — 3 no-coverage mutants
- InventoryDbContextFactory.cs: 0.00% — 2 no-coverage mutants

**Survived mutations (assertions too weak):**
- InventoryQueries.cs: 6 survived (on top of 11 no-coverage)
- StockCommands.cs: 72.00% — 6 survived
- ProductStock.cs: 81.63% — 7 survived + 2 no-coverage
- InventoryDbContext.cs: 85.29% — 15 survived
- StockEntry.cs: 3 survived
- StockReason.cs: 2 survived
- StockSourceType.cs: 2 survived

**What needs to be done:**
1. Write integration tests for ProductStockRepository.cs — 13 uncovered mutants, biggest leverage
2. Write integration or unit tests for InventoryQueries.cs — 17 total undetected
3. Tighten assertions on StockCommands.cs — 6 survivors at 72%, close to threshold
4. Add unit tests targeting survived mutants in Domain/ProductStock.cs guard clauses and state transitions
5. Cover StockReason.cs and StockSourceType.cs enum/value-object paths

Report location: StrykerOutput/2026-06-09.22-44-38/reports/mutation-report.md

title: Improve Catalog mutation score from 63% to 75%+
description:
Stryker run on 2026-06-09 scored 63.07% for the Catalog module — above the break threshold (60%) but below the low threshold (75%). The biggest gaps are:

**No-coverage (untested paths):**
- ProductCommands.cs: 3.57% — 77 no-coverage mutants (biggest single win available)
- ProductQueries.cs: 0.00% — 6 no-coverage mutants
- CategoryRepository.cs: 0.00% — 7 no-coverage mutants
- LocationRepository.cs: 0.00% — 5 no-coverage mutants
- UnitRepository.cs: 0.00% — 4 no-coverage mutants
- CatalogDbContextFactory.cs: 0.00% — 2 no-coverage mutants

**Survived mutations (tested but assertions missing):**
- Domain/Product.cs: 55.56% — 36 survived mutants
- Domain/ProductConversion.cs: 44.44% — 1 survived + 4 no-coverage
- Domain/ProductSku.cs: 44.44% — 3 survived + 2 no-coverage
- Domain/Unit.cs: 73.68% — 5 survived
- CatalogDbContext.cs: 82.63% — 17 survived

**What needs to be done:**
1. Write integration tests for ProductCommands.cs — this alone would dramatically move the score
2. Write integration tests for ProductQueries.cs
3. Extend existing repository integration tests to cover CategoryRepository, LocationRepository, UnitRepository (pattern from IntakeRepositoryTests or existing Catalog repo tests)
4. Add unit tests targeting survived mutants in Domain/Product.cs (guard clauses, equality, validation logic)
5. Add unit tests for ProductConversion.cs and ProductSku.cs uncovered paths

Report location: StrykerOutput/2026-06-09.22-27-04/reports/mutation-report.md
